Would you consider Arachne's WoD worth getting?
I just started the game so I am unsure if either would be worthwhile to me instead of expanding my roster first. I did get one Arachne at least.

Arachne can pretty easily carry you in the story so long as you can give her some sustain and maybe Cassiah (Aurita would be a plan B but just not as good) and play her well

not that they’re higher priority but since they go away faster, I’d advice try and get e0 Hymn of the Sovereign and Manikin of Oblivion Wheels of Destiny; after that e2 Arachne and get e0 her wheel and she can at least be a story carry
